Thanks for reporting issues back to TeamPass!
This template is ONLY for BUG / DEFECT / ISSUE reports.

For QUESTIONS or REMARKS, please use:

> **Tip:** A diagnostic report can be generated automatically from the TeamPass
> admin panel under **Admin > Bug icon on bottom left**. Attaching it here
> speeds up the investigation significantly.

IF THIS TEMPLATE IS NOT FOLLOWED, the issue may be closed without a response.
